@graph.name: Seamless Gutters & Gutter Guards - Capitol Improvements
@graph.description: Seamless aluminum gutter installation and gutter guard systems in Maryland, DC, and Virginia. 5-inch and 6-inch gutters, fascia board replacement, and professional gutter repair.

itemOffered.name: Seamless Aluminum Gutter Installation
itemOffered.description: Custom-fabricated seamless gutters in 5-inch and 6-inch K-style profiles.

itemOffered.name: Gutter Guard Installation
itemOffered.description: Micro-mesh and reverse-curve gutter guard systems to keep leaves and debris out.

itemOffered.name: Gutter Repair
itemOffered.description: Leak repair, re-pitching, downspout repair, and end-cap replacement.

itemOffered.name: Fascia Board Replacement
itemOffered.description: Rotted or damaged fascia board replacement — often needed before new gutter installation.

itemOffered.name: Copper Gutter Installation
itemOffered.description: Premium copper gutters for historic homes and high-end architectural applications.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between 5-inch and 6-inch gutters?

acceptedAnswer.text: 6-inch gutters hold significantly more water and are better suited for larger roofs or heavy rainfall areas.
Quality micro-mesh gutter guards significantly reduce debris buildup. They substantially reduce cleaning frequency.
Seamless gutters are fabricated on-site from a continuous roll of aluminum. No seams means fewer potential leak points.
